description: Style NoteIf you want a bag that's funky, stylish, cool and comfortable to carry around all day, check out this piece from adidas. Carry it to college, work or on a casual day out with your friends. This bag is also miCoach compatible allowing you to listen to you favourite tunes as you train.Product DetailsBlack backpack with orange trim, one slide compartment with plastic fasteners, one front zipped compartment and miCoach music player pocket, one main zipped compartment with inner slide pocket, two adjustable shoulder straps with progressive shock control, branding on the front, pocket on the right side with elasticated mouth, foam backing to ease pressure on the back with Climacool technologyMaterial and Care100% PESWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustSizeHeight: 44 cmWidth: 26 cmDepth: 19 cm
